---
title: "Vignette 3: PCRA Reproducibility"
---

How to access and run the chapter demo R scripts: the `demo()` command, copy/paste workflow, sourcing with `rstudioapi`, character of the scripts, and setup of `devtools` and Rtools.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
[Download PDF](pdfs/vignette-3.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary} &nbsp;&nbsp; [View on GitHub](https://github.com/robustport/PCRA/tree/main/vignettes){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-secondary} &nbsp;&nbsp; [Demo Scripts on GitHub](https://github.com/robustport/PCRA/tree/main/demo){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

```{=html}
<iframe src="pdfs/vignette-3.pdf" width="100%" height="950px" style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```
